Event: The Bastion Treasure Hunt
Event Date: 19/02/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: SL46
Iron Bulwark Bow Soul

Once in a while, over 4 sec., the unit's attacks reduce all stats of the target by 20% for 4 sec. Stacks up to 4 times. During that time, when the attack hits, arrows are launched from the attack target at 2 nearest enemy units. On hit, the arrows deal 500000 physical damage, and also reduce targets' physical armor by 30% for 4 sec. Stacks up to 4 times.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
